name: Arjun, International Chess Player
headline: Sustained focus through 6-hour tournament days
challenge: During multi-round tournaments, mental fatigue was costing critical endgame decisions. Arjun could not reliably tell when cognitive load was peaking until mistakes appeared on the board.
intervention: Used Orbit during training blocks and pre-match preparation 4x per week. Tagged high-stakes sessions to build a personal focus baseline across morning and afternoon play.
quote: Orbit showed me exactly when my mind was still sharp — and when I needed to reset before the next round.
